name: user_request_promotion
description: Promote tasks with 'user_needed' tag to high priority

name: age_based_promotion_7days
description: Promote tasks pending > 7 days to medium priority

name: age_based_promotion_14days
description: Promote tasks pending > 14 days to high priority

name: quality_based_promotion
description: Promote tasks related to research with score >= 8.0

name: keyword_based_promotion_ml
description: Promote tasks with ML/AI keywords to medium priority

name: keyword_based_promotion_trading
description: Promote tasks with trading keywords to medium priority

name: deprioritize_completed_related
description: Lower priority for tasks related to completed low-quality research
